changelog: Stage-4 deterministic quadrant-flip solver (0 API calls) — targets near-miss FAILs at prec=1:1000-3000
Empty-bearing purge upstream of geoCalls count — ensures heavy repair triggers correctly
Stage-3 AI prompt: added distance-anomaly and duplicate-leg detection patterns
New suffix strip: Westwardly / Eastwardly / Southwardly now resolve to bare cardinals
Degree-only bearing support: S 60° W parses without minutes/seconds
Space-separated intercardinals: North Easterly now normalizes correctly
Compound direction guard: Southeasterly and Southerly treated as meander gap
Vision fallback empty-JSON guard eliminates spurious WARN logs
